titles.title: As a Child We Were Poor

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As a child we were poor, and tossed in the blues I wept bitter tear drops alone in my room, The family circle was broken by troubles and sin But Jesus held on to my hand.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus held on to my hand Giving me comfort that only He can More than a father, brother or friend But Jesus, held on to my hand.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: At the old saints revival they were making the plea, I joined them in singing, He is all that I need He is all that I need I sat at the altar after three weeks to stand But Jesus held on to my hand.
